violations.description: FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some light covers and ceiling vent covers in kitchen area need cleaning. Curtains to kitchen need cleaning.

EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Employees noted eating lunch on prep table.
TEMPERATURE MEASURING DEVICES (1 pts): Display cooler noted with no thermometer.
HANDWASHING LAVATORIES AND SUPPLIES (3 pts): Soap noted not provided at hand washing lavatory in dishwashing area.
